function.name: ranked_search
function.description: Search documents and rank results by relevance.
function.long_description: Performs a search across documents and ranks results based on the frequency of query terms.
example_user_queries: Run a ranked search for "authentication failure" with limit 5.
Find the top 10 results for "quarterly revenue dashboard".
Search for "network timeout" and return the best 3 matches.
Rank results for "employee reimbursement policy" with a limit of 8.
Give me the top 6 matches for "disaster recovery plan".
Search "shipping delay" and keep the top 4 results.
Return the highest ranked 7 documents for "customer churn analysis".
Do a ranked search for "billing integration" limited to 5.
Find the top 9 results for "SOC 2 controls".
Search for "mobile app crash" with limit 12.
